titles.title: Laying in the Presence of the Sun

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1 v5 v1 v6 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh Lord, here I am, Laying in the presence of the sun Let the rays from the golden cross Shine on me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We see the signs in the earth and sky Time is at hand Fearful signs and roaring waves Time is at hand

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I look and see the fig tree blooming Time is at hand The bride tree has been restored Time is at hand

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The seed has become the seed again The shuck has pulled away The bride is called and sealed away The rapture is at hand

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: It's harvest time, and I must get ripe Lord, hear my prayer The stature of a perfect man, Lord, that's my cry

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Behold! The Bridegroom cometh! Arise and trim your lamps Riding through the midnight hour The prophet cried. He's here.
